name: Hot Dog Chili from Aiken Pool Hall, Aiken, Sc
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the hamburger meat and add it to a 4-quart pan.
2. Add enough hot water to the meat to create a thick mixture.
3. Stir until smooth.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients.
5. Cook slowly for one hour, adjusting consistency with water or beer as needed.
